referenceRule: Use the attached Better Together Garden Seal only to preserve brand warmth, palette, and crisp organic edge character. Do not duplicate its ring geometry, center symbol, proportions, or layout.
globalPrompt:
## Better Together app icon concept - research-led Round 3
- Deliverable: ONE finished square app icon concept, shown straight-on and filling the square canvas.
- Brand meaning: two people actively tending one living relationship. Connection becomes growth.
- Brand style: premium editorial wellness brand; confident, warm, emotionally intelligent; crisp organic geometry with slight human irregularity; flat vector-master appearance suitable for later rebuilding as exact SVG and Apple Icon Composer layers.
- Palette: ONLY warm paper #FAF8F5, coral #E5533A, deep forest #113B36, and saffron #D99A3D.
- Composition target: one dominant centered silhouette; 16 to 20 percent optical safe margin; two to four dominant foreground shapes; strong figure-ground separation; visually balanced at 20 px.
- Layer target: opaque full-bleed background plus two or three clearly separable foreground groups with hard, defined edges.
- MUST: use a true unmasked square source; keep every important feature inside the optical safe area; make the symbol recognizable as a one-color silhouette; create an original Better Together mark.
- NO text, letters, monograms, numbers, slogans, UI screenshots, app screenshots, photography, stock icon look, Apple hardware, trademarked marks, copied competitor geometry, pre-rounded app-icon mask, rounded-square border, bevel, glow, drop shadow, glass border, scenery, pot, literal tree, literal people, faces, hands, infinity symbol, chain link, butterfly, wings, yin-yang, loading spinner, or generic heart symbol.
- Do not imitate Headspace, Paired, Calm, Finch, Agape, Locket, Structured, Moonlitt, Tide Guide, or grug. Their artwork was not provided; only general measurements informed the simplicity targets.

technical: no alpha holes in the full-bleed background
human: Reads as one clear symbol at 20 and 29 px
Does not resolve into a heart, face, letter, ring-only logo, or competitor lookalike
Contains separable parts for a 1.2 to 1.8 second connect-and-grow motion
Feels like the same Better Together family without repeating another finalist
Can be rebuilt as exact vector geometry without relying on raster texture

concepts.name: Garden Seal Studio
concepts.idea: Two asymmetrical protective arcs gather around a single living center without becoming a closed ring.
concepts.motionLabel: Arcs gather, center rises, form settles
concepts.watchout: Keep the opening unmistakable and the center botanical, never heart-shaped.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed deep forest #113B36.
- Symbol: two thick warm-paper #FAF8F5 arc segments with different lengths and different opening positions. Together they suggest shelter but do NOT form a complete circle or loading ring.
- Living center: two separate coral #E5533A stems converge at one saffron #D99A3D seed node, then rise into two small offset leaves.
- Geometry: arcs occupy most of the frame; living center is large enough to remain legible at 20 px; exactly four dominant foreground pieces.

concepts.name: Shared Soil
concepts.idea: Two grounded forms meet below a sprout, making partnership feel active rather than decorative.
concepts.motionLabel: Grounds meet, seed lifts, leaf opens
concepts.watchout: The lower forms must read as abstract support, not hands, hills, or a landscape scene.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Symbol: one deep-forest #113B36 grounded ribbon rises from the lower left and one coral #E5533A grounded ribbon rises from the lower right. The two broad forms meet beneath center without crossing.
- Negative space: the narrow space between the forms creates the vertical stem of a sprout.
- Accent: one substantial saffron #D99A3D seed-leaf shape sits above the meeting point.
- Geometry: no enclosing circle, no horizon, no scenery; three dominant foreground groups.

concepts.name: Paired Canopy
concepts.idea: Two bold canopy forms create a protected seed through the space they share.
concepts.motionLabel: Canopies open, seed appears, pair breathes
concepts.watchout: Keep the canopies grounded and botanical; reject anything that reads as wings or a butterfly.
concepts.variation:
- Background: a perfectly flat, fully opaque, full-bleed coral #E5533A square extending into every corner. ABSOLUTELY NO rounded corners, inset field, border, mask, or white corner areas.
- Symbol: two compact, blunt deep-forest #113B36 canopy forms sit entirely inside a 20 percent safe margin in the upper-middle of the canvas. They are separated by a clear vertical gap and are intentionally different in height and contour. They are botanical shelter forms, not trees, broccoli, wings, or mirrored lobes.
- Center: one compact warm-paper #FAF8F5 seed silhouette sits below the gap without touching either canopy.
- Accent: one small saffron #D99A3D rectangular growth notch is cut into the top of the seed.
- Geometry: all foreground pieces occupy the central 60 percent of the canvas; no foreground shape touches any canvas edge; no heart-shaped gap.

concepts.name: Rooted Duo
concepts.idea: Two independent stems share one foundation and lean toward growth without losing their identity.
concepts.motionLabel: Roots anchor, stems lean, leaves turn
concepts.watchout: The stems must remain clearly separate and must not meet in a heart-shaped crown.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed deep forest #113B36.
- Symbol: two short, thick warm-paper #FAF8F5 stems begin from two separate rounded anchor shapes near the lower-left and lower-right. There is NO shared base and NO horizontal bar. Each stem curves gently inward and stops near the middle of the canvas, leaving a generous gap between the two endpoints.
- Endings: one blunt coral #E5533A leaf grows from the outer side of each stem, angled outward; the leaves do not touch.
- Accent: one substantial saffron #D99A3D seed floats in the center gap between the two stem endpoints.
- Geometry: compact cradle-like symbol occupying the central 62 percent, with no long posts, door, goalpost, tuning fork, letter H, letter U, hands, ring, pot, or heart.

concepts.name: Promise Seed
concepts.idea: Two different halves protect one seed while a new shoot appears in the space between them.
concepts.motionLabel: Halves part, shoot rises, seed closes
concepts.watchout: Keep the outer silhouette seed-like and asymmetric; reject a coffee bean, avocado, flame, heart, or letterform.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Symbol: one large vertical seed silhouette in the center, built from TWO separate asymmetrical halves. The left half is deep forest #113B36 and broader at the bottom. The right half is coral #E5533A and broader at the top. The halves never touch and their outer contours do not mirror each other.
- Negative space: the gap between the halves is a clean, gently rising stem shape.
- Accent: one substantial saffron #D99A3D shoot emerges from the top of the gap and bends slightly left.
- Geometry: one dominant compact silhouette occupying about 58 percent of the canvas; no circle, ring, border, letter U, letter H, coffee bean, avocado, flame, heart, yin-yang, or closed badge.

concepts.name: Living Weave
concepts.idea: Two paths cross once, exchange support, and continue as a new growth pattern.
concepts.motionLabel: Paths approach, cross once, tips sprout
concepts.watchout: One crossing only; reject any infinity, chain, Celtic knot, or generic link reading.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed coral #E5533A.
- Symbol: one thick warm-paper #FAF8F5 path rises diagonally from lower left and one thick deep-forest #113B36 path rises diagonally from lower right. They overlap exactly once near center, then separate and terminate in blunt leaf-like ends.
- Accents: two small saffron #D99A3D growth nodes sit near the separated upper tips.
- Geometry: one crossing only, strong diagonal energy, four dominant foreground pieces; no ring, loop, knot, chain, or infinity shape.

concepts.name: Confluence Sprout
concepts.idea: Two independent paths join once and become a new upward growth.
concepts.motionLabel: Paths arrive, node joins, shoot rises
concepts.watchout: The joining point must read as growth, not a road junction, martini glass, or letter Y.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Symbol: one very broad coral #E5533A path enters from the lower-left and one equally broad deep-forest #113B36 path enters from the lower-right. They curve toward center and terminate against opposite sides of one substantial saffron #D99A3D joining node. They do not overlap.
- Growth: from the top of the saffron node rises one short deep-forest #113B36 shoot ending in one blunt coral #E5533A leaf angled slightly left.
- Geometry: one compact, bold, asymmetrical confluence symbol inside a 19 percent safe margin; no ring, road markings, arrows, letter Y, cocktail glass, person, heart, or tree canopy.

concepts.name: Shared Crown
concepts.idea: Two separate trunks sustain one confident canopy, with the joining point visible rather than hidden.
concepts.motionLabel: Trunks rise, crown fills, center warms
concepts.watchout: Keep the crown one graphic mass and avoid a cloud, mushroom, broccoli, or scenic tree illustration.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed deep forest #113B36.
- Main silhouette: one oversized warm-paper #FAF8F5 crown occupies the upper-middle. Its top is one broad asymmetric arch; its bottom edge has exactly two shallow inward cuts. It is a graphic crown-canopy, not a fluffy cloud or cluster of circles.
- Support: two separate thick coral #E5533A trunks rise from the lower-left and lower-right into the two inward cuts. They never touch each other.
- Accent: one substantial saffron #D99A3D joining node floats in the negative space between the trunks just below the crown.
- Geometry: three dominant foreground groups inside a 17 percent safe margin; no pot, ground, scenery, fruit, face, mushroom, broccoli, cloud, or generic tree clip art.

concepts.name: Seed Exchange
concepts.idea: Two directional growth forms pass one seed through the center, turning reciprocity into the icon story.
concepts.motionLabel: Forms turn, seed passes, tips open
concepts.watchout: Keep the opposing forms open and diagonal; reject a circle, yin-yang, refresh icon, or chase symbol.
concepts.variation:
- Background: full-bleed coral #E5533A.
- Symbol: one thick warm-paper #FAF8F5 growth form starts near lower-left, bends once toward upper-center, and ends in a blunt leaf tip. A separate deep-forest #113B36 growth form starts near upper-right, bends once toward lower-center, and ends in a different blunt leaf tip. The forms remain open, never close into a circle, and never mirror each other.
- Center: one substantial saffron #D99A3D seed sits in the clear gap between their bends without touching either form.
- Geometry: diagonal, open, asymmetrical composition inside an 18 percent safe margin; no arrows, circle, ring, yin-yang, refresh icon, chasing loop, letter S, heart, or infinity symbol.
